div.div:
_reusable-lint.yml
workflow_call のみ
inputs: tier / language / path
- fmt (rustfmt / gofmt / prettier / dotnet-format)
- buf lint
- go-layer-check
- secret echo 禁止 lint

rect.style: fill: light-dark(rgb(218, 232, 252), rgb(29, 41, 59)); stroke: light-dark(rgb(108, 142, 191), rgb(92, 121, 163));

div.div:
_reusable-test.yml
- cargo nextest (Rust)
- go test -coverprofile (Go)
- vitest (TS) / coverlet (C#)
- coverage 集約 → Mimir
- 閾値 リリース時点 warn / 1a 80% / 1b 90%

rect.style: fill: light-dark(rgb(218, 232, 252), rgb(29, 41, 59)); stroke: light-dark(rgb(108, 142, 191), rgb(92, 121, 163));

div.div:
_reusable-build.yml
- Kaniko image build
- SBOM 中間 artifact
- lint / test 成功後に発火
- image は local registry に保持
- build artifact を push に引渡

div.div:
_reusable-push.yml
- Harbor push (robot$-ci)
- Trivy scan gate (Critical 拒否)
- cosign keyless 署名 (OIDC → Fulcio)
- Rekor 記録
- SBOM attest
